writing.task1:
Hi City Customer Service Team
I noticed I received a parking ticket on August 17, 2025 at 81 Bình Phú for my car (F3/42C 9397), but I had already paid for parking. I’ve attached my receipt as proof. Could you please check and cancel the ticket
Thank you for your help
writing.task2: I agree. I believe university exams should be conducted in person. In-person exams allow teachers to properly monitor students, making cheating much more difficult. For instance, when exams were held online during the pandemic, several universities noticed a rise in dishonest behavior, like students consulting notes or collaborating secretly. Conducting exams on campus ensures a fairer evaluation of each student’s abilities
writing.task3: The three energy plans differ in price, fixed fees, and the share of renewable energy. Plan A costs a moderate amount and uses 30% renewable energy, Plan B is slightly cheaper with 50% renewable energy, and Plan C is the most expensive but completely renewable. Considering both cost and environmental impact, Plan B is the best choice for most users

testData.testTitle: IELTS Starter 2.0 Practice Test (EN–VI) — Paper B
